description_long: This is a large, multi-axle military vehicle with a long, cylindrical payload mounted on its chassis, likely a missile transporter or launcher. The vehicle features eight large wheels on each side, providing significant ground clearance and off-road capability. Its exterior is covered in angular, armored panels, with a robust, utilitarian design and minimal decorative elements. The front cab is boxy and reinforced, with small, protected windows and access hatches. The rear section houses the main payload, which is secured and streamlined, with visible mechanical components for deployment. The entire vehicle is finished in a uniform, matte gray color, with no visible camouflage or military insignia.
description: A large, armored military vehicle with eight wheels per side and a long cylindrical payload, finished in matte gray. It has a reinforced cab and robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow, armored cab with small windows and the cylindrical payload centered behind it.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the vehicle, eight large wheels, and the long cylindrical payload mounted on top.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back end of the payload and the vehicle's robust, armored structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the wheels, armored panels, and payload from the other side.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, angular armored panels; reinforced cab and payload housing; no visible reactive or modular panels.
attribute_tire_type: Eight large off-road tires per side with deep tread pattern; appear reinforced for heavy loads.
